Petr..Back: Stiffness in the back. Pain in the back on rising from a seat.
Petr..Back, pain: Stiffness in the back. Pain in the back on rising from a seat.
Petr..Chest: the trouble extends to the chest, causing a catarrhal condition with cough. He coughs especially at night, and there is emaciation of the body with pain and soreness of the chest. Dry, hacking cough, alternating with copious expectoration; emaciation about the chest.
Petr..Chill: coldness in spots is quite a feature of this remedy. Coldness in spots; coldness in the stomach, in the abdomen, in the uterus; coldness in a spot between the scapula; coldness in the heart - sensation as if the heart were cold.
Petr..Extremities: Paretic conditions, especially left-sided. Weakness of muscles, weakness of the lower extremities, especially left-sided.
Petr..Extremities, coldness: coldness in spots is quite a feature of this remedy. Coldness in spots.
Petr..Generalities: Sore bruised feeling all over the body, especially in the joint. Rheumatic pain in the joints on motion; sore to touch; sensation as if bruised. It is analogous to Arnica in relation to bruises.
Petr..Genitalia female: Sweat and moisture of external genitals of both sexes. Scurfy nipples; white, bran-like scurf; itching; always peeling off. If the woman is in run-down health, then the nipples inflame and become oversensitive to the touch of clothing.
Petr..Head: Petroleum is suitable in old stubborn occipital headaches. The pain often remains in the occiput, but when very severe it extends up over the top of the head to the eyes and forehead. Pain from occiput over head to forehead and eyes, with transitory blindness; he gets stiff; loses consciousness.
Petr..Mind: Among the early things that Petroleum does to a prover is that it puts him in a state of confusion of mind and dizziness; he is dazed so that he loses his way in the street. She has strange imaginations that there are people near her who are not present; that the atmosphere is full of strange forms; that her limbs are double; that another person is in the bed with her.
Petr..Mind, irritability: This annoys him day and night.
Petr..Rectum: Catarrh of the rectum, much mucus with the stools. Diarrhoea during the day time, ameliorated at night, while the patient is quiet and at rest.
Petr..Skin: The skin is rough, ragged, exfoliates, cracks, bleeds; the tissues are hardened; this occurs sometimes about the palms of the hands and nails. This tissue ulcerates, and the ulcers eat and spread. All eruptions itch violently. He can not rest until he scratches the skin off, when the part becomes moist, bloody, raw and inflamed.
Petr..Stomach: Catarrh of the stomach and bowels. He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. Nausea and qualmishness all day.
Petr..Appetite, increased (hunger in general): He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat.
Petr..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat. With the diarrhea there is constant hunger, yet he cannot eat without pain.
Petr..Vertigo: The Petroleum constitution produces a peculiar vertigo which comes on under regular circumstances, when on ship-board, or riding in a carriage, or on the ears. It suits occipital headache from riding on the ears, or from such motions, with nausea like seasickness.
Petr..Generalities, pain: Sore bruised feeling all over the body, especially in the joint. Rheumatic pain in the joints on motion; sore to touch; sensation as if bruised.
Petr..Appetite: He cannot eat without pain, but he has a gnawing hunger which drives him to eat. There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat.
Petr..Appetite, ravenous: There is an all-gone, hungry feeling after stool, which drives him to eat. With the diarrhea there is constant hunger, yet he cannot eat without pain.
Petr..Clinical: Very sensitive to change of weather, like Phos. and Rhod.; aggravated before a thunder storm. Often sensitive to air and cold. Lean, emaciated subjects; threatening consumption. Eruptions disappear of themselves or are suppressed. Hands and feet burn; wants the palms and soles out of bed.
